ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 var cause = if(error.exception.errorMessage.payload.cause != null) error.exception.errorMessage.payload.cause.message else if(error.exception.errorMessage.payload != null) error.exception.errorMessage.payload else error.exception.cause.message output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier, layer: "product-papi", description: error.detailedDescription, cause: cause }
